title: ReCrafted Mobs
description: The pack for all your mobs of the Minecraft Universe!
body:
# ![spark_seerver](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

## ![behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)
***
ReCrafted Mobs is the ultimate resource pack featuring many mobs from the Minecraft universe from the following games:

*   Minecraft Dungeons/Arcade
*   Minecraft Earth
*   Minecraft Legends (WIP)
*   Story Mode (NEW)
*   Bedrock/Education Edition
*   Mob/Biome Vote Mobs
*   Scrapped Mobs
*   April Fools Mobs

## ![reecrafed_logo](https://i.imgur.com/73KcXlO.png)

# ![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)
***
This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

## ![feaeturees](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)
***
These mob variants all can be renamed to their appropriate skin and can spawn naturally.  
This pack also comes with an Ultimate Edition, with extra resource packs bundled into one big mob pack!  
![mobs](https://i.imgur.com/s5R89qT.png)

## ![notes](https://i.imgur.com/36E9Ed4.png)
***
This pack wouldn't be possible if it wasn't for:

*   Cave Fox
*   kekkman
*   PinkuRinku
*   RavenVLemon
*   Ewanhowell5195
*   MickeyJoeAlpha

[RavenVLemon Dungeons Collection](https://legacy.curseforge.com/collection/120699/dungeons-collection/)
